description: The execution-to-issues SKILL.md still tells agents to append schema-valid objects to .excn/issues/backlog.json (pre-ADR-0011) and never names the to-execution issue create CLI. That doc rot is why agents improvise the invocation and hit the flag landmines. Rewrite the write step to the real CLI recipe: one issue create per slice; minted UUIDv7 ids; repeated list flags for multi-item fields; bare presence flags; capture each minted id to wire depends_on in dependency order.
title: Refresh execution-to-issues skill to teach the issue create CLI
root_cause: Skill predates the per-file UUIDv7 cutover; it documents the monolith backlog.json append flow and omits the CLI entirely.
fix: Replace the backlog.json append section with a to-execution issue create recipe covering required flags, list flags shown as repeated occurrences, bare booleans, and dependency-order id capture; drop the scan-for-max-EXEC-NNN id guidance.
acceptance_criteria: SKILL.md no longer instructs appending to backlog.json
It shows a to-execution issue create invocation using a repeated --acceptance-criteria flag
It documents capturing the minted id to populate --depends-on in dependency order
No remaining claim that the author hand-assigns EXEC-NNN ids
